MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (D501)

Appearances on THUR-FEB-07-2013:
Plaintiff SIXTH STREET BALDWIN HOUSE HOTEL LLC is represented by Maria Rios who is present with Attorney Howard M. Olsen
Defendant RICHARD HARRIS is present with Attorney Jessica Yeh representing the defendant through limited scope

Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants, and respective counsel confer in Dept. 501A for settlement discussions.

This case settles. The trial date of FEB-11-2013 is vacated.
